name: Baked Chili
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Green pepper, cut in strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt suet in a large, heavy pot.
2. Add meat, peppers, onions, chili powder, salt, pepper, MSG, bay leaf, and garlic.
3. Brown the meat mixture until the peppers and onions are tender.
4. Add beans, cover, and simmer for 1 hour, stirring occasionally.
5. Preheat oven to 375°F.
6. In a separate bowl, combine flour, sugar, baking powder, and cornmeal until well blended.
7. In another bowl, mix egg and buttermilk.
8. Pour the egg mixture into the flour mixture and beat until smooth.
9. Let stand for 5 minutes.
10. Pour chili filling into a 9x13-inch cake pan.
11. Spoon topping over chili and spread to touch the sides.
12. Bake for 30 minutes or until the cornmeal crust turns golden.
